name: skill-forge
description: A growing collection of high-quality, installable Claude Code skills. First up: prompt-crafting — turn a rough idea into a production-grade prompt for Claude through a short alignment dialogue.

plugins.name: prompt-crafting
plugins.description: A skill that turns a messy idea into a production-grade prompt for Claude through a deep alignment dialogue, grounded in Anthropic's official prompt-engineering guidance — a ready-to-use prompt by default, or a reusable --template for API use.

plugins.name: maintenance
plugins.description: Maintainer tooling for skill-forge. refresh-references re-fetches the official source docs behind any skill's reference library, diffs them, and proposes updates — keeping sourced references current.
